rulings.Calendar Matter: For Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt As To Defendant Advocate Mines, Limited'S Compliance With Asbestos General Order No. 129
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, March 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. For Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt As To Defendant Advocate Mines, Limited's Compliance With Asbestos General Order No. 129. Plaintiffs' order to show cause is granted in part and denied in part. Advocate Mines must fully comply with all applicable provisions of General Order 129 including verification of discovery responses within 60 days. If necessary, Advocate Mines must hire or contract with a person to become sufficiently apprised of the reasonably available responsive information and verify responses. = (220/HEK)
